programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a woman whose body was cryogenically frozen before being dumped in a swamp; Cam is nervous to meet Arastoo's parents; Booth is up for a promotion.

programme.desc: When Rollins strikes a deal with the managers of a gambling club in order to protect her job, she ends up drawing the suspicion of Benson and Tutuola.

programme.desc: After a single mom is arrested for leaving her young daughter alone for days, Sgt. Benson suspects the woman may have been abused in her own childhood.

programme.desc: Sgt. Olivia Benson is investigated by Internal Affairs after William Lewis' death; as pressure mounts, Olivia has to choose between her convictions and her badge.

programme.desc: Amaro's by-the-book handling of a starlet's arrest gets him back on the SVU squad in time to investigate the actress's latest offense, statutory rape.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: From the Immaculate Reception to the Minneapolis Miracle, take a look back at every play that's earned a nickname.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Dolphins demolish Broncos, 70-20, setting NFL record for most points in a game since 1966. De'Von Achane shines with 203 rushing yards.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills overcame a 21-0 second-quarter deficit and snapped a 15-game losing streak against New England Patriots where quarterback Fitzpatrick had a 21-point comeback. From Week 3, 2011.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Brian Hoyer and the Browns complete the largest comeback in league history by a road team in their 29-28 victory over the Titans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the rematch between the Baltimore Ravens and the Denver Broncos where Peyton Manning threw a record-tying seven touchdown passes.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Week 8, 2016 matchup between the Oakland Raiders and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers where quarterback Derek Carr finished with a franchise-record 513 yards passing, completing 40 of 59 passes without an interception.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Week 8, 2015 matchup between the New Orleans Saints and the New York Giants where Drew Brees passed for 505 yards and an NFL record-tying seven touchdowns, and recently signed Kai Forbath kicked a 50-yard field goal as time ran out, giving the Saints a 52-49 victory in a game with a record 13 scoring passes.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Stepping up in mop-up duty, backup quarterback Matt Flynn capped his 480-yard and six-touchdown performance with a go-ahead touchdown pass to Jermichael Flynn with 1:10 left to give the Packers a 45-41 road win over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jay Cutler threw three TD passes to Brandon Marshall just for good measure, and the Bears put up their highest points total since 1980, routing the Tennessee Titans 51-20 on Sunday for their sixth straight win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rookie Odell Beckham Jr. caught three touchdown passes and came within one reception of tying the team's single-game record against the Redskins during Week 15 of the 2014 season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rob Bironas kicked a 26-yard field goal in overtime, and the Titans stopped backup quarterback Shaun Hill on fourth down to finally pull out a 44-41 win over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: 2007 Week 9 game highlights between the Chargers and Vikings where running back Adrian Peterson sets the rushing record.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Minnesota Vikings rookie running back Adrian Peterson runs for an NFL-record 296 yards and three touchdowns in Minnesota's dominating 35-17 win over the San Diego Chargers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In an offensive showcase for the ages, Peyton Manning's Broncos pull out a wild win over Tony Romo's Cowboys. Denver and Dallas combined for 99 points and more than 1,000 total scrimmage yards in a wild Week 5 matchup in 2013.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 2018 Week 11 matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Los Angeles Rams where there were 14 touchdowns, including three by defensive players. There were 56 first downs. There were 105 points, with 50 from each team.

programme.title: Gang Girl

programme.title: Home Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: After living far apart to pursue their careers, three siblings return home, where tragedy strikes, but love prevails, in this Gospel play on film.

programme.title: Kiss Me Once
programme.desc: Gabrielle, a delusional romantic, fixates on anyone who shows her the slightest interest. Her obsession turns dangerous when her feelings aren't reciprocated.

programme.title: Boyz for Life
programme.desc: Two detectives pursue an international criminal who stole Escobar's stash from the LAPD, swapping identities to protect a witness.

programme.title: Scandalous
programme.desc: Lady Watts, a bestselling author, reveals secrets about her affairs with those closest to her in her latest memoir. At her launch party, a heated argument turns violent, and she's left unconscious. As detectives investigate, secrets, love triangles, and betrayal emerge. The search for the attacker leads to twists and turns, involving everyone from her talent manager to her labelmate. The truth about the night of the attack is slowly revealed, with unexpected consequences for all involved.

programme.title: The Groomer
programme.desc: Layla is a young and attractive woman who meets Bryce in her teen years, and he is who she claims to be the love of her life. Unbeknownst to her, Bryse is manipulating her and forming her into his own object of desire. Layla is under his spell, until a different side of him that could destroy her.

programme.title: Back Home
programme.desc: A drug kingpin looking to expand his empire finds the venture to be much harder than he anticipated when he lacks support amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Legends of the Highway
programme.desc: They were self-taught and refused to be denied. The inspiring story of the 26 Highwaymen, Black artists who found success on their own terms.

programme.title: Trap A Fool
programme.desc: After two years of what he thought was a perfect relationship, Jeremiah uncovers his beloved Shay-Shay's black book of men. He is forced to realize that her gentle nature was a facade, a calculated move in her game of fools. Shay-Shay's/.

programme.title: Quiet as Kept
programme.desc: Jay is unlawfully detained. His ex-girlfriend returns, and his business partners work to clear his name. Meanwhile, a crooked cop is under suspicion for murder, and connections are made between him and Jay. Torn between duty and loyalty, Detective Johnson is caught in the middle. As the prosecution struggles, Jay and his business partners work to exist the dangerous world cleanly.

programme.title: Only 48
programme.desc: When Tracy Harris is abducted and held for ransom, her father Keith has only 48 hours to deliver $500,000. Forced back into the criminal world he tried to escape; Keith faces dangerous alliances and hidden truths in order to save his daughter.

programme.title: For All Have Sinned
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, Mano embarks on a violent path that stems from his grief and causes him to spiral. He lives by the mantra of Romans 3:23: for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn't looking for closure, he wants her back, and he's not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara's fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time's running out.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she's hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addict,.

programme.title: Shotlanta
programme.desc: Mozzy moves from Jamaica to Atlanta, rising in the drug trade to lift his family from poverty, but faces challenges that test his loyalty.

programme.title: Aliens in the Hood
programme.desc: The hood politics of the neighborhood become even more complicated after the arrival of aliens. When one man in the neighborhood is blessed with superpowers, he and the other warring factions are headed to war over control of the current drug trade.

programme.title: Single, Saved and Searching
programme.desc: After a devastating breakup, a woman sends a prayer to God and is granted the ability to make men appear at her will.

programme.title: My Man
programme.desc: Trina, a young model, becomes entangled with Max. As their relationship deepens, she uncovers his dark secrets: a double life, a psychotic ex-girlfriend, and a dangerous obsession. When Trina crosses a line, she becomes the target of a deadly game of cat and mouse. Betrayal, madness, and murder ensue as the lines between love, obsession, and survival blur.

programme.title: Bloodline of the Jewel
programme.desc: Bride to be, Nahdulay Ncala's world is turned upside down as she finds herself in the middle of a dangerous quest for a royal jewel. Traveling from Africa to America, Nahdulay connects with an unsuspecting driver who helps her uncover the truth.

programme.title: Love Unexpected
programme.desc: A meeting with a fiercely independent girl-next-door upends the unattached lifestyle of a college playboy with a history of unresolved trauma.

programme.title: The Devil Came to Duval
programme.desc: After surviving a suicide attempt, comedian Eli Thompson faces his past on his birthday, but a night out at the bar spirals into chaos when the Devil arrives. Eli must confront betrayal, revenge, and supernatural terror to survive.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: After exposing his father’s affair, a bitter son plots revenge against the mistress, igniting a family crisis that spirals toward tragedy.
A retired singer is drawn back into her past when the remains of a missing apartheid-era policeman surface, exposing long-buried secrets.

programme.title: She's Watching
programme.desc: After finally moving into their dream home together, a young couple finds that they’re being watched every night by an obsessed neighbor.

programme.title: Guilty Victim
programme.desc: A dangerous investor with a violent past is pulled back into chaos when a home security scheme spirals out of control, forcing him to confront old wounds, betrayal, and a brutal fight to protect what little he has left.

programme.desc: Nash’s buddy Rick involves him in a deadly dispute with an angry Miami drug dealer.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: A suspect is in custody for a shooting, but Nash knows they've arrested the wrong man.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash goes head-to-head with a delusional vigilante claiming to be his partner.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash goes up against a murderous techno-geek who designs killer robots.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash must find an elusive teenager who bears an uncanny resemblance to his missing brother.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash tracks a killer whose victims all share the same name.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: When a civilian is shot and killed during a bank robbery, Cassidy is blamed.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash is after two teenagers pulling a series of armed robberies, and someone’setting up the SIU.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose; someone is trying to frame Nash.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Pressured in his personal life by his wife, who has filed for divorce, Nash goes undercover.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and the SIU unit are caught off guard when a group of rogue gangsters terrorize Chinatown.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Joe and Nash team up to track down a nefarious heroin dealer.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash tries to stop an insane ex-cop with a vendetta against the city from assassinating the Mayor.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash must find the weapon before it can be used for its final deadly purpose.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Inspector Harvey Leek vanishes while on his way to an undercover meeting with Russian gangsters.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash’s belated honeymoon with Kelly gets put on hold when he is forced to trail a notorious bookie.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Lisa team to investigate a rapidly expanding mystery after she witnesses a murder.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash triggers an internal probe and only Nash and the SIU can stop them.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Joe is exposed to a deadly virus which could leave him only 72 hours to live.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash has to track down two escapees who have personal vendettas against him.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash tracks a gang who have committed a series of high-profile robberies.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash is forced to stop a hit-man who turns out to be one of his closest boyhood friends.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash discovers his ex-wife, Kelly, still has a relationship with one of them.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and the SIU team get caught up in a train heist, forcing them to overcome a hostage drama.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: The notorious San Francisco serial killer “Zodiac,” returns to taunt Nash and his mentor.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash gets stuck with an 11-year old delinquent who’s the link to busting a drug kingpin.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe find themselves having to solve a murder while fending off a trio of hit-men.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: A people-smuggling ring brings Nash and Joe to the aid of a young man searching for his parents.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: It’s a strange Christmas Eve at the SIU, as personal crises abound.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe come under gunfire and realize there’s a leak on the prosecution’s team.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Joe and Nash team up to bring down a ruthless Mexican gang leader.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe discover a fake SIU gang impersonating the police.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and the SIU work to save a kidnapped couple from a crew of crooks.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and the SIU team discover that one of their victims is Nash’s sister Stacy.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe go on the hunt for the shooter and the dealer who’s putting guns into kids' hands.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash feels responsible when he discovers a woman is the daughter of a volatile S.F.P.D. Inspector.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash teams up with a cop from the Windy City until he learns she’s not as perfect as he thought.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash’s old nemesis from the SIU is now a bounty hunter and is in competition with Nash.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash takes down the leader of a Chinese gang while helping an old friend.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe go head to head with the leader of a team of Urban Commandos.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash and Joe help FBI Special Agent Katz recover a cache of stolen FBI weapons.

programme.title: The War Wagon
programme.desc: An ex-convict and his partner eye an armored stagecoach full of gold fitted with a Gatling gun for protection.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A series of thefts are falsely attributed to the innocent Mingo False Faces

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye has tracked outlaw Simon Girty to Morristown

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: Commissioned by President Andrew Jackson to aid an Army Major sent to foil a plot to withdraw Louisiana from the Union, Jim Bowie is forced to impersonate him when assassins arrive on the scene.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: Duprez, the owner of a land grant that gives him the prior title to a large tract that Jim Bowie and his brother have recently sold, is forcibly evicting the buyers, alleging they were defrauded.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: Jim Bowie comes to the aid of young ladies of a finishing school and their teacher when he finds himself involved in an elopement ? which turns into an abduction.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: Jim Bowie loses a fortune in trade goods to river pirates and almost loses his life in recovering them.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho find themselves in the middle of a feud between the guards at a gold mine and the mine's workers, who the guards suspect of stealing gold from the mine.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho go up against a gang of bank robbers who use a sleeping gas potion in their robberies.

programme.title: Six Black Horses
programme.desc: A widow (Joan O'Brien) crosses the desert with a drifter (Audie Murphy) and the gunman (Dan Duryea) who killed her husband.

programme.title: Bullet for a Badman
programme.desc: A lawman (Audie Murphy) leads a posse in search of a bank robber (Darren McGavin), an old friend whose ex-wife he married.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: A man is forbidden to avenge his son's death.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: A fiercely independent woman hires a gunman as a ranch hand.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: An aging sheriff who was asked to retire proves his worth one more time.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theater
programme.desc: Two brothers are bound together by a promise and a woman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister rushes a young wounded hoodlum to Tombstone's hospital, putting him under the care of nurse Mary Rice; when the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnaps her and the dying boy, Hollister and the wounded man each attempt to save the nurse.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fragment of the Epitaph's are found at the scene of a robbery and on the body of a known killer; Hollister and Claibourne discover a strange code in the help wanted ads and with a planned typographic error; they smoke out a robbery gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: With the Mississippi River rising towards a record flood, the only thing that could save New Orleans would be to punch a hole in a levee up-river. Such an action would inundate Lady Charity's new plantation & she isn't willing to allow it! Yancy and Colton try to negotiate, but Lady Charity refuses to budge and instead turns to escaped convict, Rogue Donovan, to protect her land.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: Yancy wins a half-share of a Virginia City silver mine and must immediately utilize its assets when the boiler on his riverboat blows up. To collect his assets, he travels to Virginia City, where he meets his beautiful partner, Julia Bulette. She explains that the mine dried out, but Yancy soon discovers that workers from a neighboring mine have been stealing their valuable ore.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: After Bat wins a herd of cattle in a high-stakes card game, a determined rancher makes it difficult for Bat to convert his winnings into cash.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat encounters a group of wranglers who are stealing horses. A old flame of Bat's asks him to rescue her current beau, accused of murder and shackled to a tree by a lynch mob.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The daughter of a recently murdered newspaper publisher rebels against the man who has oppressed the town.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A mission-educated Indian girl finds her efforts to teach her people stymied by her brother's hostility.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A calculating man, desperate for gold, frames Tonto for murder.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A boy hero-worships escaped outlaw Gaff Morgan.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: During an 1870 train heist, a gang steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President and prompts a manhunt for its recovery.

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: While riding into town for provisions, a wagon train scout encounters an old flame, now married to a corrupt man who is holding the town hostage.

programme.title: Warpath
programme.desc: A man (Edmond O'Brien) joins the cavalry in his quest for two killers (Dean Jagger, Forrest Tucker) ; Indians capture all three.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: The fight for mayor in a small town election gets out of hand when a murder takes place. Gene takes matters into his own hands as he fights for a decent community.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: A killer, convicted on evidence given by Pat, swears revenge on both Pat and the presiding judge.

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: A shooting occurs when an outlaw gang tries to kidnap the governor.

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: A pair of hired gunmen ambush a friend of Roy's friends on the Double-R Bar.

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: A tyrannical Boston financier travels to Mineral City to confront his son.

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: A young man has been wrongly accused of murdering his fiancé's father

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Hoppy tries to trick an elderly woman's kidnappers by inducing Red Connors to wear her clothes.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Hoppy and Red arrest a young man whom they find wounded near the body of his uncle, but they soon learn that he's suffering from amnesia and try to clear him.

programme.title: The Duel at Silver Creek
programme.desc: A gang of outlaws is murdering miners and taking over their claims, but they cross the wrong man when they target the father of Luke Cromwell (Audie Murphy), a gunslinger known as the Silver Kid. The local marshal, Lightning Tyrone (Stephen McNally), is also tracking the gang, but receives a crippling injury during a gunfight. Tyrone deputizes Cromwell, and the two take on the murderers together, while trying to resist the charms of Opal (Faith Domergue), the new beauty in town.

programme.title: Hell Bent for Leather
programme.desc: An honest horse-trader (Audie Murphy) is framed for murder by a marshal (Stephen McNally) out to make a name for himself.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Vigilantes cannot agree on whether to try or to kill a man accused of robbing Dion Patrick.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Dion seeks retribution when a journalist is killed.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Rev. Spangler tries to assist a girl involved with prominent bandits.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Bandits attempt to stop a group of Chinese immigrants from settling in their area.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Liz Dolthan persuades Sam Wade to place her jewelry overnight in the Wells Fargo safe, and remembers the combination as she watches him open it; Hollister's sharp mind and keen observations help him solve the subsequent $20,000 theft.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jonas Bell is killed in a scuffle with Hollister after a bank clerk is murdered; siblings Noah and Lady Bell conspire to avenge their father targeting Hollister.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: Pahoo is accused of an assassination attempt on the General Custer and taken into custody. Custer disregards Yancy's explanation that the weapons are from a different tribe than Pahoo's Pawnee. Meanwhile, Yancy discovers that he is being stalked by a Native American seeking revenge for a past wrong.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: When Mississippi riverboats sink in record numbers, Yancy investigates if these shipwrecks are an act of sabotage. He joins aboard the Southern Belle, owned by a fiery redhead, which ends up being the latest victim in a suspicious string of wrecks. Yancy finds a connection between the murder of Charlie Webster and a dispatch key belonging to a ship pilot.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Dressed-up dandy (derby and cane), gambler and lawman roams the West charming women and defending the unjustly accused. His primary weapon was his wit (and cane) rather than his gun.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat finds himself tied to a tree and left for the bears when the hunting party he is guiding turns out to be a trio of outlaws wanted for robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill has been hired to guide two Easterners who want to capture wild stallions to use as studs for breeding.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill Longley shares a stagecoach compartment with Jody Sammett and his pregnant wife Maria on their journey to meet Jody's father, Big Jim Sammett for Christmas.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: After Longley rescues the wounded Reverend Kilgore from two would-be bushwhackers, he learns that the parson was heading for a town with a reputation for killing men of the cloth.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Longley is hired to drive the first herd of cattle directly from the Texas Panhandle to Denver.

programme.desc: The famously upbeat comedian delivers a stand-up performance that includes his observations on the perils of raising daughters and much more.

programme.title: Bob Smiley: Tartar Terrorist

programme.title: Bob Smiley: You're Just Hungry
programme.desc: The fast-talking comedian discusses touring with a Christian group, laughter being the best medicine, and having a last name TSA agents love.

programme.title: Brian Posehn: The Fartist

programme.desc: Brian Posehn brings his signature style to San Diego Comic-Con, rocking the House of Blues with hilarious stand-up and some over-the-top surprises.

programme.desc: The comedian discovers a renewed passion for a sci-fi franchise, discusses the loss of his heroes, and his hot takes on certain recording artists.

programme.desc: Jeff and his felt friends Walter, Melvin the Superhero Guy, Peanut, and others share their latest and greatest thoughts about our times.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Minding the Monsters
programme.desc: The comedian and ventriloquist extraordinaire, along with this felt friends, visits a haunted house where hilarious chaos ensues.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged in Hollywood
programme.desc: Previously unseen stand-up comedy by Jeff Dunham; sketches that include popular characters; Brad Paisley performs; special appearances by comic Chris Parnell and former UFC champion Chuck Liddell.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Arguing With Myself
programme.desc: Join Jeff and his outspoken felt pals: Walter, Peanut, José Jalapeño, Bubba J, and Sweet Daddy Dee for an evening of laughs and observations.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: All Over the Map
programme.desc: A comedy set and travelogue by comedian Jeff Dunham as he and his ventriloquist’s dummies perform globally from Iceland and London to Israel.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: The ventriloquist comedian provides fresh, hilarious material with his favorite puppets; Walter, Peanut, and two brand new characters.

programme.desc: Witness the comedian’s final stop on her Stripped tour at Madison Square Garden, full of unexpected observations about history, religion, and more.

programme.desc: Comedian Rachel Scanlon unpacks her life as a soft butch lesbian, from hot tub trauma with her midwestern family to fantasies about her gym teacher.

programme.desc: The laugh-out-loud funny stand up comedian focuses his special on the hilarious highs and relatable lows of everyday married life.

programme.title: Jimmy O. Yang: Guess How Much?
programme.desc: Yang dives into love languages, loser friends and negotiating with his Asian parents.

programme.title: Todd Glass Talks About Stuff
programme.desc: In this caustic comedy special, veteran stand-up quipster Todd Glass makes audiences howl with his take on some of society's unspoken "rules," from complimenting kids to giving directions.

programme.title: Tiffany Haddish: She Ready! From the Hood to Hollywood!
programme.desc: The sensational “Girls Trip” star shares about her positive outlook on life, growing up in the foster care system, and working with legends.

programme.title: More Funny Women of a Certain Age
programme.desc: Caroline Rhea headlines a cast of women for a night of uninhibited stand-up comedy; featuring Carol Leifer, Tammy Pescatelli, Thea Vidale, Carole Montgomery, and Julia Scotti.

programme.title: Jimmy Della Valle: Famous Nobody
programme.desc: Comedian Jimmy Della Valle is well-known for his high energy, rapid-fire delivery, amazing improvisation skills, and hilarious one-liners.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: Undeniable
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin brings his blunt and undeniable style to this stand-up set about athletes and racial stereotypes, relationships, and human mistakes.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: The excitable comic again proves why he is one of the world’s premiere funnymen, ripping into racial stereotypes, Viagra, the First Lady, and more.

programme.title: Al Jackson: Baby Steps in a Yellow Tuxedo
programme.desc: Al Jackson hilariously navigates us through the life lesson that no matter how many times you stumble along the way, you can always do it with class.

programme.title: Jeff Shaw: Manly Girly Man
programme.desc: The Cleveland-born comic brings his stimulating satirical comedy—infused with a sense of idealism, humanity and poetic beauty—to a live audience.

programme.title: Joey Coco Diaz: Sociably Unacceptable
programme.desc: It's been 25 years in the making and now Uncle Joey Diaz is at Seeso for his first socially unacceptable special. Prepare yourselves, savages.

programme.title: Josh Fonokalafi: The Specific Islander
programme.desc: Raised in the Northwest and the son of an Islander immigrant, Joshua relates his hardships growing up as one of the biggest minorities in the country.

programme.title: D.L. Hughley: Clear
programme.desc: Comedian D.L. Hughley comments on current political events and hot topics, from marijuana legalization to the advantages of intrusive white neighbors.

programme.title: D.L. Hughley: Reset
programme.desc: Notable standup comedian D.L. Hughley skewers current political events, his own family issues, and more in this hilarious standup special.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: Freezing Hot
programme.desc: The acclaimed Last Comic Standing winner explains how women hate being cold, but love cold weather, and other hilarious observations.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: War Paint
programme.desc: Iliza Shlesinger performs her first stand-up special in her hometown of Dallas, Texas.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Aloha Fluffy
programme.desc: The comic discusses his crazy world of family, friends, and world travels.

programme.desc: Darlene and Ben hunt for apartments; Jackie, Becky, and Beverly Rose road trip to Mexico to meet her father; Dan confides financial woes to Louise.

programme.desc: Chuck's new purchase of a boat creates a rift; Darlene hires her first assistant at Wellman's Plastics but soon realizes she is anything but helpful.

programme.desc: Rahat’s crew lures unsuspecting victims into a fake film shoot and gym session where chaos unfolds.

programme.title: Scare Tactics
programme.desc: A young man attends a screening of scary short films that turns horrifyingly real. Hosted by Tracy Morgan.

programme.title: Scare Tactics
programme.desc: A night worker’s girlfriend is lured into a deadly trap. Hosted by Tracy Morgan.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin agrees to give his life-rights to Bridgette when she gets her own reality show.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Arsenio Hall shows up to poker night with Craig Robinson—who had a role in sabotaging Kevin’s pilot.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin and Nick compete for the last star on The Hollywood Walk of Fame.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin attempts to meet with Paramount President, Doug Howard, to put his dream project into development.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin inadvertently takes "candies" while in the company of rapper, Lil’ Tweetzie.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin checks into a Malibu rehab center for some court mandated therapy.

programme.title: Celebrity Prank Wars
programme.desc: Getting his revenge for Nick's epic animal prank, Kevin teams up with Chance the Rapper to prank Nick Cannon on his way to set.

programme.title: Celebrity Prank Wars
programme.desc: Exploiting Anthony Anderson's love of golf, Joel McHale sets the stage for an explosive prank.

programme.title: Celebrity Prank Wars
programme.desc: Lil Jon gets his revenge with a fast-and-furious prank filled with speedy cars and outrageous stunts.

programme.title: Celebrity Prank Wars
programme.desc: WWE Superstar Brie Bella pranks her twin sister Nikki.

programme.title: Next Day Air
programme.desc: Two inept criminals trigger a series of events that changes ten people's lives forever.

programme.title: School Dance
programme.desc: A teen hopes to impress a girl he likes by winning a spot on his school's hottest dance crew.

programme.title: Mac and Devin Go to High School
programme.desc: Rappers Snoop Doog and Wiz Khalifa team up to create this ultimate stoner comedy about high school.

programme.title: Rapture-Palooza
programme.desc: Craig Robinson and Anna Kendrick lead as a couple trying to save the world by defeating the anti-Christ.

programme.title: Who's Your Caddy?
programme.desc: A rap mogul tries to join a conservative country club.

programme.title: Chick Fight
programme.desc: A down-on-her-luck woman joins an underground, all-female fight club.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A bizarre ocean creature spreads panic throughout Florida after a botched scientific experiment in "Devilfish.".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watches a horror film about an accursed skull mask.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Operation Double 007" spoofs James Bond flicks. With Neil Connery.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Angels' Revenge" Crime Drama. Young women in armored van pick fights; with Jack Palance, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Women of the Prehistoric Planet" (1966) Science fiction. Alien astronauts land on a strange place, but it's only the beginning of Earth. With Wendell Corey, Keith Larsen, John Agar.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Master Ninja II" (1983) Martial arts. The Master (Lee Van Cleef) searches the United States for his long-lost daughter. From the TV series.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch as the Doctor Mordrid defends Earth from the forces of evil, and Dr. Kabahl schemes to increase viewership.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Teenage Strangler" (1964) Horror. There's a high-school killer on the loose.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A secret organization called Mighty Jack (1968) uses a submarine to battle a terrorist organization. Joel and the Bots make a Mighty Jack pet food commercial and sing the song "Slow The Plot Down!".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "King Dinosaur" (1955) Science fiction. Scientists land on a planet, find primitive monsters and nuke them. With Bill Bryant, Wanda Curtis, Douglas Henderson.

programme.title: Cinematic Titanic
programme.desc: Dr. Frankenstein uses a sub-standard brain on his latest creature.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Giant Spider Invasion" (1975) Cult. Scientist and girlfriend spy car-size mutant spiders; with Steve Brodie, Barbara Hale.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Wild Rebels" (1967) Action. An auto racer poses as getaway driver for outlaw bikers. With Steve Alaimo, Willie Pastrano, John Vella.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Daddy-O" (1959) Crime drama. Hoodlums want a singing truck driver to drive their getaway car. With Dick Contino, Sandra Giles, Bruno VeSota.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Mad Monster" (1942) Horror. A reporter's girlfriend's father injects a farmhand with wolf blood. With Johnny Downs, George Zucco, Anne Nagel.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots learn the ins and outs of the circus in the short Here Comes the Circus (1946) and then try to make sense of the Nordic fairy tale film The Day the Earth Froze (1959).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: “B” movie seems too generous a term for this one — is there such a thing as a “Z” movie? Rondo Hatton plays a disfigured man, a/k/a “The Creeper,” who hunts down and kills the people responsible for his deformity.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Jack Frost" (1966) Kids. Grandfather Frost freezes a girl; a villager thaws her.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Crash of the Moons" (1954) Science Fiction. Our hero fights evil in outer space. From the "Rocky Jones, Space Ranger" TV series.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Crawling Eye" (1958) Horror. With Forest Tucker, Laurence Payne.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER

programme.title: 1 vs. 100
programme.desc: Professional dancer Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this show in which a contestant can win $50,000. The contestant, known as the One, competes with a mob of 100 other players by answering questions. When the One answers correctly, each member of the mob that answered incorrectly is eliminated. The One earns money for each mob member who is eliminated. If the One can eliminate the entire mob, he wins $50,000. But if the One gets a question wrong, he is eliminated and the remaining mob members split his winnings.

programme.title: Tug of Words
programme.desc: Based on the playground game Tug-O-War, teams of two compete to answer word-clue questions correctly and pull the flag on the tug of war rope to their side.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey assumes the hosting duties for this daytime game show in which five members of one family are pitted against five members of another family. Each team's goal is to guess the results of audience survey questions. A player from each team initially faces off, answering the question to earn the chance to either pass or play. The winning family gets a chance to earn extra cash in a bonus round.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: This week contestants on Wipeout Australia are bought undone by a seemingly simple obstacle on the Qualifier, the Slippery Stairs. It’s all in the name really, an innocent set of stairs, covered in Wipeout Crash cream. Its up the way and down the way for all and sundry. The lucky 12 that move through, battle it out with a giant toothbrush Sweeper. ‘Nat with the Tats’ and Renee ‘Lets get physical’ move through to the Dreadmill, flying the banner for the ladies. Look out for Scotty Six Toes at the Big Balls and get the ear plugs ready as you meet Herr Chris. It’s a colourful week with leotards, laughs and lots of ladies.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow, Monty Don shows which plants to choose for sensational borders right through the summer - from ornamental grasses to late flowering perennials. He also plants out squashes and pumpkins, as well as making his own comfrey feed. Meanwhile, Carol Klein is at Glebe Cottage giving advice on the best hardy geraniums for different situations and sharing tips on how to lift, divide and propagate them.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty faces some of the most surprising plans yet - a Norwegian garden complete with waterfalls to be fashioned out of a tiny back yard in Dorset, and nothing less than a Japanese tea garden to be created out of a patch of ground in Bromley.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At the renowned RHS Malvern Spring Festival, otherwise known affectionately as the `plants and people show', Monty Don gets an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at the impressive displays, plants and show gardens on offer.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don turns his attention to planting out his sweet peas and potting up lilies, and Carol Klein returns to Gloucestershire to help first-time gardeners, Dan and Dominique, plant up their new border in the style of a cottage garden.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don offers advice on making the perfect herb garden - and plants out some beautiful garden stalwarts into his cottage borders, while Carol Klein is with new gardeners Dan and Dominique, giving their veg patch a necessary kick-start.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Carol Klein is with Billy Carruthers in West Lothian, enjoying his wonderful and varied collection of flamboyant peonies. Joe Swift visits world-renowned opera venue Glyndebourne in Sussex and is given an exclusive tour of their gardens.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: British summer time means that, from Saturday, we all have an extra hour to get out in our gardens in the evenings just as the early spring display is coming into its own. At Longmeadow, Monty Don introduces us to the coppice, a woodland area where his favourite flower, the primrose, is in bloom. As well as enjoying the seasonal colours of spring, it's time to plan the summer display. Monty sows sweet peas.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: The team is in Liphook with a challenge on their hands. Anne and Shaun have a big garden, and a daughter who has her own ideas on what makes a perfect outdoor space. Can the Rich brothers save the day, or will Charlie's design suit the family best?

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Tracey and Rob's Newport home has it all: dangerous sloped banks, a multi-level space full of wild weeds, overgrown hedges and too many trees. For those brave enough to make it to the top, however, the garden offers a magnificent view.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie and the brothers go head to head to win the right to make over the garden of Christine and Tony, who were shot in a terrorist attack in Tunisia in June 2015. If ever a couple needed the peace and consoling virtues of a garden, it is this one.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie and the Rich brothers are in Northampton at the garden of Theresa and Martyn. The couple have retired and with their children moved out and providing them with grand children, they would like to enjoy a formal cottage garden.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty travels across Central Spain. He begins at the vast, imposing palace and garden of the Escorial before heading for Madrid, Toledo, other parts of Castile and finally Valencia.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don is in the south of Spain, visiting gardens that show how this part of the country has evolved thanks to influences from visitors and settlers from ancient to modern times.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don travels across northern Spain, visiting gardens across this vast and diverse landscape that changes from an Atlantic to a Mediterranean climate as he journeys from Galicia to Catalonia.

programme.title: Monty Don's Japanese Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don returns to Japan during the fiery blaze of autumn. He visits the three great gardens of Japan to learn how they protect the garden from the coming winter and learns how the Japanese are weaving nature into their concrete urban jungle.

programme.title: Monty Don's Japanese Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don returns to Japan during the fiery blaze of autumn. He visits the three great gardens of Japan to learn how they protect the garden from the coming winter and learns how the Japanese are weaving nature into their concrete urban jungle.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty revels in the sweet peas he grew from seed earlier in the year and shows how to keep their display going on into the weeks ahead. Meanwhile, Rachel meets a couple from Hampshire who have created their entire garden around their obsession for one plant, the hosta. Elsewhere, Carol travels to Wales to find out how one man tackled his sloping plot to make a garden on five different levels.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: This show celebrates the arrival of the holiday season. At Longmeadow, Monty ensures that there will be late summer colour by propagating some his favourites from the fantastically diverse salvia family. He also divides irises and reveals what has gone wrong with his onion crop. Joe finds seasonal inspiration at historic Newby Hall in North Yorkshire, home to the longest herbaceous borders in Europe.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Toby Buckland visits the RHS garden at Hyde Hall in Essex for ideas on creating and planting a dry garden, while Carol Klein shows her gardening students how to collect seeds.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don is planning ahead and planting autumn-flowering crocus at Longmeadow. Also for autumn colour, he's adding cyclamen to the spring garden, and has tips on how to get a great show from them. Meanwhile, Joe Swift visits Marks Hall - a surprising but inspiring modern garden and Carol Klein is in Staffordshire with a couple who've created a garden for all seasons in their half-acre plot.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don unveils his plans for a wet meadow. He starts by planting herbaceous perennials that will thrive in heavy soils and also look good amidst the long grass. He also pots-on his salvia cuttings and explains the benefits of planting `green manure' in the veg patch. Now that he has harvested his potatoes, that is exactly what he is doing to boost the fertility of the soil for next year.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don shows what to do now to maximise next year's soft fruit crop by pruning his summer raspberries and planting on the strawberry runners he potted up a few weeks ago. As Monty harvests September's abundance in the vegetable garden he makes notes of the tastiest varieties he has grown this year which he would grow again next year, as well as sowing some quick growing crops to harvest in the autumn.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don has got advice on taking cuttings from favourite roses to bulk up stock for free. He is also sowing in the vegetable garden now for a winter salad harvest right up until Christmas, and planning ahead and planting a beautiful display of narcissi and foxgloves to enjoy next spring and summer. Meanwhile, Carol Kelin is at Glebe Cottage collecting seeds from her favourite flowering perennials.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don has advice on how to successfully store an apple crop so it will last through winter and explains why he thinks it high time wall flowers came back into fashion. With tomatoes now over, Monty clears his greenhouse and plans for next year by planting garlic in the vegetable garden. Meanwhile, Carol is home at Glebe Cottage, dividing her perennials to continue the cost-effective stocking of her new beds.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow, Monty is planning for next summer by sowing a batch of sweet peas. Meanwhile, Carol Klein is amongst the leaves, bark and berries at Thorp Perrow Arboretum in Yorkshire admiring the onset of the autumn display. Plus, there's a visit to Ryton Gardens in Warwickshire to find out about their collection of heritage vegetables and how to collect their seeds.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With autumn well under way, some plants in the garden need to be brought in under cover. Monty Don makes a start by insulating his greenhouse to provide a winter home for all sorts of tender plants and gives his tips and techniques for ensuring their survival until next year. Carol Klein visits the garden of a tropical plant enthusiast to find out how he protects some of his exotic specimens.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don gets going with some autumn garden maintenance whilst looking back over the year and reviewing his borders - which plants have done well and others that haven't. As he clears annuals that are past their best he plans a colourful display for late spring by planting up the garden with tulips. Carol Klein is at Glebe Cottage continuing work on her new raised beds and taming an overgrown and unruly rambling rose.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: In this Christmas edition, the team celebrate the festive season from a gardener's point of view. At Longmeadow, Monty and Rachel have a good clear up. Monty rejuvenates his rhubarb patch, introducing a local Herefordshire heritage variety apple tree to his orchard. Meanwhile, Carol discovers some of Britain's best winter walks and Rachel gets some tips on how to make beautiful Christmas decorations for the garden.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don visits two sets of ambitious gardeners, each facing challenges on a very different scale. One is a tiny urban courtyard in Hackney and the other is a outdoor area for a community.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty comes to the rescue of two couples in need of help transforming their rubble filled back gardens into havens of peace and tranquillity. They are in serious need of help and advice but can Monty set them on the right track?

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: In Brighton determined duo Helen and Dax have their hands full with twins, one of whom has special needs. Meanwhile in High Wycombe, newly single Valerie is looking for a fresh lease of life.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Carol Klein and Joe Swift are at Gardeners' World Live in Birmingham. Joe will be casting an expert eye over the spectacular show gardens, while Carol will be focusing on the delights of the floral marquee.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With the Wimbledon tennis championships just around the corner, Joe Swift meets the gardening team responsible for the spectacular floral displays at this world-renowned event.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With the garden growing before our eyes, Monty Don has plenty to be getting on with at Longmeadow. In preparation for late summer grass borders, he's filling the gaps that the diseased box hedges have left with grasses he's raised from seed.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don welcomes us to his garden at Longmeadow and offers some tips on keeping our gardens at their best throughout the season. Carol Klein meets wildlife enthusiast Steve Head, to discover more about the wildlife that depend on our garden ponds.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don takes a look at the use of pots and containers and revels in their versatility, practicality and potential and shows us how best to use them in our own gardens. Carol Klein returns to Stroud to see how the new gardeners are progressing.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Morocco, Monty discovers the wide variety of paradise gardens. He begins just outside the city of Marrakesh in an enormous royal walled meadow, The Agdal. From there he moves to the heart of the town where he comes upon a tiny garden where huge banana plants jostle with palms to create a secret paradise garden, a shelter from the busy world outside. And in another part of the city a rundown old palace has been turned into a stunning contemporary garden with a twist.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Turkey Monty is dazzled by an extraordinary display of the Ottoman Empire's favourite flower, the tulip, and learns of its sacred significance. Travelling further East to India he encounters a new type of spirituality in the tomb gardens of the Mughal Empire. Stunning mausoleums were set in vast gardens as places where an earthly king could enter a divine paradise.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty travels to Europe and explores the influence of the Venetians on gardening. To begin with, he explores Venice on one of the city's famous barges, stepping out to visit green spaces large and small that are often hidden from view behind high walls.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty begins in the city of Trieste, close to Italy's border with Croatia, to visit a public garden first created by an obsessive royal plantsman more than 150 years ago, which is now being carefully restored. He then heads down the Adriatic coast through Croatia to pick up the trail that the Venetians followed, ending his journey on the beautiful island of Lopud, near Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty begins the last leg of his journey in Corfu, a Greek island with strong Venetian links, including olive trees planted by them that are still grown today. Here, Monty visits a spectacular garden made by an Englishman with Greek connections.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don conducts a personal grand tour around Italy's magnificent gardens from the luxurious retreats of the moneyed north to the lavish hideaways of the romantic south. In this episode, he's in and around Rome, a powerbase of emperors and popes, to explore gardens that are among some of the most extravagant and flamboyant ever created in history.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don is on a grand tour around Italy, this time visiting gardens both in Florence and around the sun-scorched Tuscan countryside. Monty discovers how, like a piece of sculpture, renaissance gardens were created as works of art, and how a group of Edwardian ex-pats mistakenly reinforced the idea that formal Italian gardens were flowerless.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don continues his grand garden tour of Italy. This time he is in Naples to visit some of the most sublime, romantic retreats in southern Italy. After all the formality of the green gardens around Rome and Florence, Monty seeks out idyllic horticultural gems set against the dramatic scenery of the Amalfi Coast to discover why, in the south, gardens are informal and, above all, filled with flowers.

programme.title: Monty Don's Italian Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don concludes his garden tour of Italy in the wealthy north where, in the Veneto and Lucca, extravagant pleasure gardens were created for flirtation and fun. In the Lakes, Monty meets up with the garden society, the Grandi Giardini Italiani, to peer over the fence at luxurious creations of the rich and famous. The journey ends on Lake Maggiore to see the most theatrical horticultural gem of Italy.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As well as looking at the changes to his garden that have taken place over winter, Monty Don reveals how to plant bare-rooted raspberries in his renovated fruit garden and gets his secateurs out to rejuvenate an overgrown winter flowering honeysuckle. Plus, Monty recommends jobs for the weekend to ensure that all our seeds, seedlings and plants get off to the best possible start.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With the official start of spring and Mothering Sunday only days away, Monty Don and the team look at the practical ways to achieve a better looking garden at this busy time of year. Monty is selecting and planting climbing roses at his garden in Herefordshire and gives plenty of advice on how to get them to thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: A perfect oval composition! Come along with Bob Ross and see a secluded cottage with wild daisies and birch trees near a small woodland pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic snow-covered peaks and evergreens loom over lush green grasslands as Bob Ross takes you into his world of natural beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Strong mountains, proud evergreens and luxurious trees and bushes hug the velvety smooth foothills in today's Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: A weathered fence guards a rustic country home shadowed by tall trees as Bob Ross creates another masterpiece in his unique style.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross for a happy half-hour as he creates one of his beautiful mountain and evergreen scenes, complete with path and ample bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross brings springtime to the canvas, all around a tiny cabin set in a landscape of hazy green hills and cottony clouds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: A mellow background gives way to chunky rock formations, trickling waterways and happy trees in this Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross today, over a sweet old footbridge, across a little creek a'splashin' through the woodlands.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today's beautiful Bob Ross painting focuses on both an awesome cloudy sky, and a turbulent sea of crashing waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: A virtual explosion of color as Bob Ross paints blazing orange and gold trees below a ridge of magnificent mountain peaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: What a delicate view of polar beauty; Bob Ross taps his brushes to make subtle hills, sleeping grasses and leafless trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: A frozen pond and snow drifts would be so cold, except for the warm rich sky and late autumn foliage in this Bob Ross painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross delights us with his oval landscape - blue skies, frosty mountain, fresh foothills and polished lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: The beach is such a lovely sight as afternoon comes to an end - Bob Ross paints this seascape with gold, purple and orange hues.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Prepare the canvas just-so, and in the end you'll have a Bob Ross landscape -- mighty mountain, homey cabin and meadow -- in a window!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine the peace and serenity of a home in the hollow, sheltered from the snow-covered mountains beyond! Travel with Bob Ross to just such a place.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with artist Bob Ross and peer into the north country in the midst of winter; experience a vision in the coldest of azure tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on this colorful Bob Ross display of nature's exciting seashore panarama … beautifully tucked within an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting With Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely stroll with Bob Ross and gather your thoughts in the quiet misty woodlands; this lovely masterpiece is a great lesson in using the knife.
